title: Inter Miami vs Chicago: Match Analysis and Stats
description: Reports indicate a 3-2 victory for Miami over Chicago on July 22, 2026, with coverage from ESPN, Inter Miami CF, and BBC.

sections.heading: Match Result
paragraphs: According to ESPN, the match played on July 22, 2026, concluded with a score of Miami 3, Chicago 2.

sections.heading: Competition Details
paragraphs: Inter Miami CF identified the event as an MLS Regular Season game. The club noted that Inter Miami returned to action for a home game against Chicago Fire FC.

sections.heading: Statistical Coverage
paragraphs: BBC provided coverage focusing on Major League Soccer statistics and the head-to-head history between Inter Miami and Chicago Fire.

faq.q: What was the score of the Inter Miami vs Chicago game?
faq.a: ESPN reported the final score as Miami 3, Chicago 2.

faq.q: Was this a home game for Inter Miami?
faq.a: Yes, according to Inter Miami CF, the match was a home game against Chicago Fire FC.

faq.q: What competition was this match part of?
faq.a: Inter Miami CF stated the game was part of the MLS Regular Season.
